entry.title: English within language diversification discourses: tracing ideologies at European teaching conferences in the 1970s and 1980s
entry.summary: Authors: Zorana Sokolovska, Maria Rosa Garrido DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2025-0163 Pages: Page range: 313-339

entry.title: Creating learning opportunities through cultural categories: a sequential categorization analysis of multicultural cooking instruction
entry.summary: Authors: Shu-Yu Huang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2025-0179 Pages: Page range: 341-376

entry.title: Translanguaging in parent–child book talk during shared reading in Chinese–German families
entry.summary: Authors: Yin Yu, Ming Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2024-0207 Pages: Page range: 377-406

entry.title: “Never seen Chinese people and Korean people try to learn each other’s language so hard”: scaling multilingualism and digital nationalism in transnational online conflict
entry.summary: Authors: Mengdi Liu, Luk Van Mensel, Robert Blackwood DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2025-0212 Pages: Page range: 407-435
